Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to analyze the event log identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case and interpret how their meaning changes based on position context

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case C001 Verify Documents appears twice First time initial verification incomplete Second time after customer submits additional documents

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So Verify Documents appears twice First time initial verification incomplete Second time re verification after additional docs submitted

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We can rename to Initial Document Verification and Re verify Documents after Additional Submission or Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Post Additional

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Need to reflect context The first is incomplete second is after customer submits additional

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case C002 Call Customer appears twice First call to clarify account discrepancy Second call follow up to confirm adjustments made

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So different purposes Rename Call Customer Clarify Discrepancy and Call Customer Confirm Adjustments

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case C003 Verify Documents appears twice first physical verification second re verify after account adjustment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Rename Verify Documents Initial Physical and Verify Documents Re verify after Adjustment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Only those activities recur Initiate Request Submit Additional Adjust Account and Approve Request do not recur within the same case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Present revised log by replacing activity names accordingly for C001 C002 and C003 while keeping case ids timestamps resources and context unchanged
